message.content:
Explore the IDSP EQ estimator training history and current model performance in /teamspace/studios/this_studio/insight/. I need to understand:

1. Read the training history JSON at `checkpoints/idsp-eq-v3-improved/training_history.json` — extract all metrics (train loss, val loss, per-component losses, learning rates, epoch counts per curriculum stage)
2. Read `conf/config.yaml` for all hyperparameters, curriculum stages, loss weights
3. Check if there are any tensorboard/wandb logs or other experiment tracking files
4. Look at `train.py` in detail — the full training loop, optimizer setup, LR scheduling, gradient handling, validation logic, checkpoint saving criteria
5. Check `training/` directory for any alternative training approaches

Be very thorough — read the full training_history.json and train.py files. I need exact numbers for loss values, learning rates, epoch counts, etc.

content.text: I'll thoroughly explore the IDSP EQ estimator training setup and performance. Let me start by examining the directory structure and then dive into the specific files you mentioned.

input.description: List key files in the project directory
List contents of main insight directory
